input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for fixInvalidTxFlags.
input_context.default_vote_question: Infer the latest stable release source default vote from the source-backed amendment description only.

source_facts.claim: fixInvalidTxFlags: Adds flag checks for CredentialCreate, CredentialAccept, CredentialDelete, and SignerListSet transactions. With this amendment enabled, these transactions will return a temINVALID_FLAG error if they include a flag that doesn't exist, or a contradictory combination of flags.
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
fixInvalidTxFlags appears in XRPSCAN with introduced rippled version 2.4.0.
